untertitel: Answers to the most important questions about Back to Meaning Maximization

was_ist_btmm.frage: What is Back to Meaning Maximization?
was_ist_btmm.antwort: Back to Meaning Maximization (BtMM) is a community project that develops and tests an alternative economic model. It connects economic cooperation with somatic body work and the building of local communities.

wie_mitmachen.antwort: You can join as a supporting member of the e.V. (from €50/year) or – once the founding is complete – become an active member of the cooperative. Write to us via the contact form on /mitmachen.

was_kostet.antwort: Supporting membership in the e.V. costs from €50 per year. Active membership in the cooperative is still in the founding phase – sign up for updates.

was_sind_coins.antwort: BtMM Coins are the community's internal currency. Members can use them to exchange services – e.g. body work for consulting – without money flow. Coins are managed via the BtMM app.

koerperarbeit_unterschied.frage: What distinguishes BtMM body work from other approaches?
koerperarbeit_unterschied.antwort: BtMM body work is not therapy and not a wellness offering. It is somatic accompaniment that understands the body as an independent carrier of information. We work with what is – not with what should be.

spenden_wohin.antwort: Your donation goes into building the BtMM infrastructure: technical development, legal founding of the cooperative and the first community projects. The donation status is viewable live on the website.

app_login.frage: How do I access the BtMM app?
app_login.antwort: The BtMM app runs at app.backtobalance.online and is only accessible to members. The website and app are separate systems – the login leads to the app.

zelle_gruenden.frage: Can I found my own cell?
zelle_gruenden.antwort: Yes! BtMM thrives on local cells. If you want to found a cell in your city or town, contact us. We will guide you through the process.
